EmailTemplate.description: Email to be used as a response for mid-term adjustment requests where more information is required.
EmailTemplate.name: Midterm - Additional Information Requested
EmailTemplate.subject: More Information Required
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
You recently made a request to amend your policy.
Our Underwriting Team need additional information from you in order to process this request so we would be grateful if you can provide answers to the questions below.
Please return your answers at your earliest convenience and we will aim to respond with a decision as soon as possible. Please be as thorough as possible in your response, as this will help speed up the checking process.
(add any questions here)
If you have any questions or queries please get in touch on 01242 808 740.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Service Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
